name: Creamy Apple Almond Crunch Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Apple Cinnamon or Cranberry bread mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour an 8 x 4 or 9 x 5 loaf pan.
2. Blend all filling ingredients except apples until smooth. Stir in the chopped apples. Set aside.
3. Combine all bread ingredients. Stir by hand until moistened.
4. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Spoon the filling over the batter.
6. Spoon the remaining batter on top of the filling.
7. Sprinkle with sliced almonds.
8. After the bread is completely cooled, brush with melted apple jelly.
9. Store in the refrigerator. Bake at 350 degrees for 70-85 minutes (8 x 4 pan) or 65-75 minutes (9 x 5 pan).
